{{Infobox concept
| name = Way
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Way Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Way]], also known as the [[Way Between Worlds]], is a fundamental cosmic force of pure order that sustains existence and provides stability to reality. Often described as a branching vine, a tree, or a network of sapphire-colored veins, it connects various worlds known as [[Iterations]]. This connection allows for the maintenance of natural laws and causality, protecting [[life]] from the surrounding chaos of the [[void]]. [[The Way]] is depicted as a vast, blue-lit expanse that can be navigated by certain individuals to travel between different locations or worlds, though such journeys can be unpredictable and may lead a traveler to entirely different destinations. [[The Way]] serves as the source of power for many, including those who practice the [[sacred arts]]. It can be channeled to provide healing, reinforce constructs, or stabilize reality during catastrophic events. While it offers protection and order, its strength is tied to the health of the worlds it connects; a declining population or widespread death can weaken its grasp, inviting chaos and infection. Certain powerful entities, such as the [[Abidan]], interact deeply with the Way to manage the cosmos, enforce order, and guard against destruction. Some individuals are even considered "[[Waybound]]," possessing the potential to significantly impact the grander scheme of the universe through their connection to this cosmic network.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A spatial rift is a slit in the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Way]] is a force that provides stability and order to worlds.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Way]] can be used to reinforce structures for stability.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Way]] is a vine that connects [[Iterations]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Suriel]] stepped into the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[The Way]] is the power of order that runs through all [[Iterations]] and provides power to the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Way]] is a power that can be manipulated and provides authority to [[Judges]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1">''Underlord'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Way]] can be rendered powerless to Abidans in a world.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Way]] can be severed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Way]] is mapped as a single blue light with branches of sapphire light and white spots representing [[Iterations]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] can pull people through a fold in the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Way]] is a method of reaching through space.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] stepped into the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[The Way]] provides power used by the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c1">''Bloodline'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Suriel]] can channel the [[Way]] to restore order and reverse damage.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[The Way]] is a branching structure of existence where [[Iterations]] are spots of light.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Way]] serves as a fundamental concept linked to the stability of all [[Iterations]]. During periods of chaotic interference, this [[essence]] can become disrupted, causing the hold of the Way to slip. Situated between the Void and the Way is [[Fathom]], a location where armor is known to flow through the Way.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Way]] is being disrupted by chaotic interference.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The hold of the [[Way]] can slip.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Fathom]] is located between the [[Way]] and the Void.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Way]] is a concept connected to the stability of [[Iterations]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Armor flows through the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Way]] is a strange sapphire world located beyond space that serves as a connection between realms. This connection can be weakened if planets are destroyed, and a world's temporal stability is directly linked to its relationship with the Way. During an attempt to escape, the [[Sage]] tries to travel through this expanse, which [[Suriel]] refers to simply as the [[Way Between Worlds]]. The entity is physical enough that [[Lindon]] is able to punch his fist into it.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Way]] is a strange sapphire world beyond space.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Way]] is a connection that can be weakened by destroying planets.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage]] attempts to escape by traveling through the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Suriel]] refers to the [[Way Between Worlds]] simply as the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] can punch his fist into the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A world's temporal stability is linked to its relationship with the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]] is a chaotic, rich blue river characterized by shifting currents and flows that can buffet travelers. While the [[Bow of the Silent King]] touches its surface, [[Northstrider]] once emerged from a bright blue twist within the depths. Although it can be used as a means of escape, the [[Weeping Dragon]]'s will prevents such exits, and Reigan once attempted to touch it. Within the [[labyrinth]], [[Lindon]] granted [[Northstrider]] permission to open the Way, and [[Yerin]] subsequently cut a hole in it. [[The Way]] can be commanded to restore damage, leading [[Lindon]] to hope for a deeper connection to the entity.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]] is a rich blue river with currents.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1">''Waybound'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow of the Silent King]] touches the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]] has currents.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]] can shift.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]] is a chaotic place.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] emerged from a bright blue twist in the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]] can be used to escape.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]]'s will prevents escape through the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] gives [[Northstrider]] permission to open the [[Way]] within the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Reigan tried to touch the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] cut a hole in the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]] can be commanded to restore damage.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] hoped for a deeper connection to the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]] consists of flows that can buffet travelers.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Existing outside the world, the Way is a medium involved in the process of creation that contains various branches and can be entered through portals. The [[Fox Division]] is able to bind this space to specific destinations, though a world's human population serves as the tie to it. While the [[Abidan]] hold special authority over this realm, individuals like [[Cirian]] have failed to muster a connection to it. Sensing the Way requires an individual to first learn how to sense themselves, and while it can manifest as a symbol complex within [[Lindon]]'s spirit, he does not draw power from it.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Way]] is a medium or space that can be bound to destinations by the [[Fox Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Way]] exists outside the world.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A world's human population ties them to the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] does not draw on the [[Way]] for power.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Way]] can manifest as a symbol complex in [[Lindon]]'s spirit.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Abidan]] have special authority over the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]] could not muster his connection to the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Sensing the [[Way]] begins with learning to sense oneself.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Way]] is a location that can be entered via portals and contains branches.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Way]] is involved in the process of creation.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Let’s allow the Way to do the rest, all right?”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
